name: Checkerboard Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 Unsweetened chocolate squares or melted chocolate
1/2 cup blanched almonds, browned and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the hot water, sugar, and chocolate in a double boiler. Heat until the chocolate melts.
2. Stir to blend. Soften the gelatin in cold water and add it to the chocolate mixture.
3. Stir and cook until smooth and thick, about 5 minutes.
4. Add the chocolate mixture to the egg yolks and mix well.
5. Cool for 5 minutes. Add vanilla extract and then fold in beaten egg whites.
6. Cool completely. Whip the cream and fold in nuts.
7. Add the whipped cream and nuts to the chocolate mixture.
8. Grease an angel food cake pan. Break the cake into small pieces (egg size).
9. Put a layer of cake pieces into the pan and pour some of the chocolate mixture over it.
10. Repeat until all the cake and sauce are used.
11. Cover and let set in the refrigerator for about 8 hours before serving.
12. To serve, run the tip of a knife around the top of the cake and center tube.
13. Dip the pan in hot water for about a minute to loosen it.
14. Ice with whipped cream (or Cool Whip) on a serving plate and decorate with browned almonds.
This recipe was published in The Daily Journal newspaper in Caracas, Venezuela on March 20, 1970.
